title: Xyloid Silky Korean Tofu Skewers
description: A floral and adventurous Korean dish featuring silky tofu, praline-french glaze, and macrobiotic-friendly ingredients, perfect for a unique dinner experience.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cut the silken tofu into 1-inch cubes and set aside.
In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, maple syrup, and praline paste to make the glaze.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger to the glaze and stir well.
Thread the tofu cubes onto the bamboo skewers, leaving a small space between each cube.
Brush the glaze onto the tofu cubes, making sure they are fully coated.
Place the skewers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and drizzle with sesame oil.
Bake the skewers in the preheated oven for 15 minutes, or until the tofu is lightly browned and crispy on the outside.
Remove the skewers from the oven and let them cool for a few minutes before serving.
